summary: Tested SwarmSim Live Intelligence workflow updates: 1) fetch-live returns 202 immediately (background task), 2) live-status polling returns progress_step/progress_total/progress message, 3) 8 web search queries with step-by-step progress. All core functionality working correctly. Web scraping intermittently fails due to DuckDuckGo rate limiting (external dependency).

minor.issue: DuckDuckGo web scraping intermittently fails due to rate limiting. This is an external dependency issue, not a code bug.

passed_tests: GET /api/sessions/{id}/live-status returns progress_step, progress_total, and progress message during fetching
GET /api/sessions/{id}/live-status returns completed status with graph and intel_brief when done (verified via earlier successful fetches)
GET /api/sessions/{id}/live-status returns failed status with error message on failure
Progress steps increment from 1/8 to 8/8 during the web search phase (observed 1/8, 3/8, 5/8, 7/8, 8/8)
Frontend Live Intelligence mode: mode toggle works correctly
Frontend shows topic input, prediction horizon selector, and Fetch & Analyze button
Frontend shows progress messages in System Dashboard log during live fetch polling
Empty topic validation returns 400 error immediately
Invalid session ID returns 404 on fetch-live and live-status
Agent generation still works (background task + polling) - tested with completed session
Document Upload mode still works (regression test passed)
critical_code_review_comments: Web scraping relies on DuckDuckGo HTML scraping which is rate-limited. Consider adding retry logic or fallback search provider for production use.
Progress messages are correctly displayed in System Dashboard showing all 8 search steps
seed_data_creation: None - tests create their own sessions
context_for_next_testing_agent: Live Intelligence v2 workflow tested: 1) fetch-live returns 202 immediately with background task, 2) live-status polling returns progress_step (1-8), progress_total (8), and progress message during fetching, 3) 8 web search queries with step-by-step progress messages ('Searching latest news...', 'Searching breaking developments...', etc.), 4) Frontend polls every 1.5s and displays progress in System Dashboard. Web scraping intermittently fails due to DuckDuckGo rate limiting - this is expected behavior with external dependencies. Agent generation and Document Upload mode continue to work correctly.
